noise_and_randomization._comment: P43 2026-05-23: wrapper-level DR enabled. Stacks on top of DistillationTower._sample_episode_dynamics (which already randomizes tau_top/bottom/pressure/actuator, deadtimes, and gain coefficients). These knobs add output gain/bias drift, input jitter, actuator first-order lag, MV dead-time jitter, and DV mean shift on the *outside* of the plant. Each value is a magnitude; the randomizer draws per-episode within +/- value. Disable by setting DREAMER_DOMAIN_RANDOMIZATION=0 or SIM_DOMAIN_RANDOMIZATION=0.
